title: French-Style Pan-Seared Croatian Sausages
description: A simple yet flavorful recipe featuring pan-seared Croatian sausages, perfect for a quick dinner.

ingredients.name: Croatian sausages
ingredients.notes: look for a brand that's high-quality and has a good balance of flavors

ingredients.name: pan
ingredients.notes: a stainless steel or cast iron pan is ideal for searing

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality olive oil that has a good smoke point

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: thinly slice the onion and cook it until it's translucent

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: mince the garlic and cook it for 1 minute until fragrant

ingredients.name: thyme
ingredients.notes: fresh thyme is best, but dried thyme works too

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use a flaky sea salt for the best flavor

ingredients.name: pepper
ingredients.notes: freshly ground black pepper is best

instructions: Heat the pan over medium-high heat until it's hot.
Add the olive oil to the pan and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the sliced onion to the pan and cook it until it's translucent.
Add the minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the Croatian sausages to the pan and sear them for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Add the thyme sprig to the pan and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Season the sausages with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the sausages hot, garnished with fresh thyme if desired.
